summary: Enterprise Portal Redesign - All 11 features tested and PASSED. Login page with modern dark theme, Remember Me checkbox, login functionality, dashboard with 5 stat cards, navigation tabs, time filters, language dropdown with 4 languages, language switching to English, mobile responsive view with hamburger menu, Filialen tab with 'Neue Filiale' button, and logout functionality all working correctly.

issues: Main app navbar is visible at the top of the Enterprise Portal page. While functional, this could be confusing for enterprise users who expect a standalone portal experience.

details.dark_theme: Modern dark gradient background (slate-900 to slate-800)
details.title: Händler-Portal
details.subtitle: Verwalten Sie Ihre Filialen, Kassen und Berichte
details.password_field: Passwort placeholder visible with eye toggle

details.api_response: Returns token, enterprise_id, company_name, role, expires_at

details.location: In portal header next to logout button

details.navigation_in_menu: All 5 tabs visible in slide-out menu

details.logout_action: Clears token and returns to login page

critical_code_review_comments: The Enterprise Portal is rendered inside the main app layout, showing the main navbar at the top. Consider making it a standalone route like RestaurantPortal for a cleaner enterprise experience.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Edeka test account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise Portal redesign complete and tested. All 11 features working: login page design, Remember Me, login with credentials, dashboard with 5 stat cards, 5 navigation tabs, time filters, 4-language dropdown, language switching, mobile responsive with hamburger menu, Filialen tab with 'Neue Filiale' button, and logout. Test credentials: admin@edeka-test.de / EdekaTest2026!
